AGENTS.md: # AGENTS.md â AI Operating Manual for HEXA Vision

This document is the **single source of truth** and the permanent operating manual for all AI Agents contributing to the HEXA Vision project. Every agent must read and adhere to these guidelines to ensure architectural consistency, production-grade quality, and seamless collaboration.

HEXA Vision (HexaStudio.net) is a world-class 3D Architecture Visualization platform. It is designed to showcase architectural projects through immersive, interactive 3D experiences with an "Awwwards-level" visual aesthetic, backed by an enterprise-grade software architecture.
AI_CONTEXT.md: # AI Context & Project State â HEXA Studio
**Status:** Phase 5 â Production Deployment Live â Final Polish
This file is the **primary entry point** for any AI agent joining the HEXA Studio project.
HEXA Studio is a luxury 3D Architecture Visualization platform.
AI_HANDOFF.md: # AI HANDOFF â HexaStudio Project State
This file enables any AI agent to pick up work exactly where the last agent stopped.

**HexaStudio** (HexaStudio.net) = 3D architecture visualization platform with Next.js 15 frontend, NestJS backend (BFF), Strapi 5 CMS, Docker Compose infra (14 services), and "Awwwards-level" luxury aesthetic.
BLOCKING_ISSUES.md: # BLOCKING ISSUES â Must Fix Before Production
CHANGELOG.md: - DNS nameservers changed from Hostinger â Cloudflare (`kip.ns.cloudflare.com` / `lara.ns.cloudflare.com`)
- All A, CNAME, MX, TXT (SPF/DKIM/DMARC) records migrated to Cloudflare zone
- Cloudflare Tunnel (systemd service) deployed to bypass NAT â ports 80/443 no longer need forwarding
- SSL set to Flexible mode with Always Use HTTPS

COMPONENT_GUIDE.md: This guide documents the standardized UI components of the HEXA Vision design system. All components are built using Tailwind 4 and CSS variables.
- `primary`: Black background, white text. High emphasis.
deploy-local.sh: echo "đ Starting Local Staging Deployment for HEXA Vision..."
echo "â ïž .env file not found. Creating from .env.example..."
DESIGN_SYSTEM.md: The HEXA Vision design system is built on the principles of **Hyper-Minimalism**, **Precision**, and **Immersion**. The goal is to remove all visual noise, allowing the 3D architectural visualizations to be the sole focus of the user's attention.
- **Whitespace as a Tool:** Large margins and generous padding are used to create a sense of luxury and breathability.
- **Precision Typography:** Use of high-contrast weight pairings (e.g., ExtraLight with Bold) and tight letter-spacing for headings.
- **Depth via Glassmorphism:** Instead of heavy shadows, we use translucent, blurred surfaces to create a sense of layered depth.
- **Intentional Motion:** Every transition must feel natural and purposeful, avoiding "bouncy" or "cheap" animations.
DESIGN_TOKENS.md: This document serves as the technical reference for the design tokens used across the HEXA Vision platform. All tokens are implemented as CSS variables in `apps/frontend/src/app/globals.css`.
docker-compose.dev.yml.example: # Development overrides â copy to docker-compose.override.yml if needed
# This file is NOT loaded automatically (rename to docker-compose.override.yml)
FOLDER_STRUCTURE.md: This document describes the standardized folder structure for the HEXA Vision monorepo. All agents must adhere to this layout to ensure maintainability and scalability.
- `/packages`: Contains shared libraries used across multiple apps.
- `/docker`: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and Docker configurations.
- `/scripts`: Automation scripts for setup, deployment, and maintenance.
FRONTEND_EXCELLENCE_STRATEGY.md: **Goal:** Make HexaStudio the best frontend experience in architectural visualizationâfast, cinematic, mobile-native, and SEO-perfect.
| Pillar | Initiative | Target Metric | Owner / Agent | Status | Blocking Dependencies |
IMPLEMENTATION_ROADMAP.md: This roadmap outlines the strategic path to transform HEXA Studio into a world-class, award-winning architecture visualization platform.
*Goal: Establish a pixel-perfect, consistent visual language.*
- [x] **Tailwind 4 Audit**: Refine colors, typography (luxury serif + modern sans), and spacing scales.
- [x] **Typography Hierarchy**: Implement a strict scale for headings and body text to create an editorial feel.
LOCAL_DEPLOYMENT.md: This guide describes how to deploy the HEXA Vision platform to a local Ubuntu Server (24.04 LTS) for staging purposes.
LOCAL_TESTING.md: To ensure the staging environment behaves exactly like production, follow this testing suite.
- [ ] **Hero Section:** Verify 3D canvas loads, mouse parallax works, and cinematic fly-throughs are smooth.
- [ ] **Project Gallery:** Ensure all project cards load images and transition to detail views.
- [ ] **Navigation:** Test all links in the Navbar (Portfolio, Services, Studio, Contact).
- [ ] **CMS Integration:** Log into Strapi (`/cms/admin`), create a test project, and verify it appears on the frontend.
OPTIONAL_IMPROVEMENTS.md: Non-critical improvements to address in future development cycles.
### A1. Clean Up Duplicate Traefik Configs
PERFORMANCE_REPORT.md: - **Current Status:** Achieved on Mid-to-High end GPUs.

PROJECT_DIRECTIVE.md: # HEXA Studio â MASTER PROJECT DIRECTIVE
You are the Principal Software Architect, Creative Director, Senior Product Designer, Senior Frontend Engineer, DevOps Engineer, QA Lead and Performance Engineer for the HEXA Studio project.
You own the technical and creative quality of this project.
Your responsibility is to transform this repository into a world-class digital experience.
PROJECT_REVIEW.md: The project has successfully implemented a high-fidelity 3D architectural visualization platform. The architecture is scalable, and the visual core is world-class. However, to move from "working" to "production-ready", several critical refinements are needed in memory management, accessibility, and SEO.
QUALITY_GATE_REPORT.md: # QUALITY GATE REPORT â HEXA Vision
QUALITY_SCORECARD.md: | 1 | **Architecture** | **8/10** | Clean monorepo, strict network isolation, 14 Docker services. **-1** for placeholder backend modules. **-1** for Traefik dashboard exposed. |

| 2 | **Code Quality** | **8/10** | TypeScript strict, no ESLint errors. 14 backend tests + Playwright E2E scaffold (up from 4). **-1** for some `Record<string, unknown>` patterns. **-1** for no E2E in CI yet. |
| 3 | **Visual Design** | **9/10** | Luxury gold accent, comprehensive design system, glass cards, clean typography. **-1** for placeholder social links (`href="#"`). |
| 4 | **Brand Identity** | **9/10** | Strong "Living Spaces. Visualized." Real logo deployed. Consistent voice. Premium feel. **-1** for no favicon variety. |
| 5 | **UX** | **8/10** | Skip-to-content, smooth scroll, page transitions, loading screen, error boundaries. **-1** for `cursor: none` globally. **-1** for no toast/notification system. |
| 6 | **Animation** | **9/10** | GSAP + Framer Motion, custom easings, cinematic page transitions, text reveal, parallax. **-1** for minor timing consistency. |
README.md: # đïž HEXA Studio â Architectural Visualization
Immersive 3D architectural experiences for the world's most ambitious projects.
REFACTOR_SUMMARY.md: **Sprint Goal:** Architecture refactor only â UI and functionality unchanged.

Sprint 1 established clean architecture patterns across the monorepo: feature-based frontend structure, shared packages, lazy-loading infrastructure, monorepo-aware Docker builds, and build-blocking bug fixes.
RELEASE_DECISION.md: ### Decision: APPROVED FOR STAGING â 8/10 Critical Blockers Resolved
The project is **functionally ready for production** but has **two remaining high-severity issues** that should be addressed post-launch.
RESPONSIVE_REPORT.md: The current implementation uses a standard mobile-first Tailwind approach. While the layout doesn't "break", the **experience** is not optimized for different device archetypes. The 3D canvas, in particular, behaves identically on desktop and mobile, which is a mistake for immersive experiences.
- **The Challenge:** Limited screen real estate and touch-based interaction. The current `OrbitControls` can conflict with page scrolling.
THREEJS_GUIDE.md: To achieve "Awwwards-level" fidelity, the pipeline moves from standard rendering to a cinematic post-processing stack.
- **Bloom:** Used to create a "glow" effect on high-intensity lights and metallic highlights.
- **Depth of Field (DOF):** Mimics a real camera lens to focus attention on architectural details while blurring the foreground/background.
TROUBLESHOOTING.md: **Symptom:** `docker compose up` shows errors for `backend` or `cms`.
**Fix:** Check the health of the database.
UI_REVIEW.md: The current interface follows a "minimalist-dark" aesthetic. While clean and functional, it lacks the "Awwwards-level" cinematic depth and emotional resonance required for a world-class architecture visualization studio. It feels like a standard SaaS landing page rather than a luxury portfolio.
- **Current:** Standard centered containers and symmetrical grids.
- **Review:** Too predictable. Luxury design often utilizes asymmetric balance and unconventional grid layouts to create visual tension and interest.
UX_IMPROVEMENTS.md: Transform HexaStudio from a "website that shows 3D models" into an "immersive architectural journey". The focus is on **frictionless elegance** and **cinematic pacing**.
- **Smooth Scrolling:** Integrate **Lenis** for buttery-smooth momentum scrolling, removing the "stutter" of native browser scrolling.
- **Page Transitions:** Implement seamless route transitions using Framer Motion's `AnimatePresence` to avoid jarring hard cuts.
